productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Hard Rock Purple Shirt
description: CompositionPurple shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a full front buttoned placket, short sleeves, yoked back, one pocket on left chest with stitch detailing and branding and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationswrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt with its spread collar is just asking to be paired with a cowboy style shoestring tie.
